message:
fix: bigint group key restoration, cache key collision, distinct columnar perf

Three issues found during code quality audit:

1. partial-agg.ts: finalizePartialAgg restored bigint group keys as strings.
   String(Number("9007199254740993")) !== "9007199254740993" caused fallback
   to string instead of BigInt. Now detects integer-only strings that fail
   Number round-trip and restores via BigInt().

2. query-do.ts + local-executor.ts: queryKey/queryCacheKey hashed
   computedColumns by alias only — different function bodies with the same
   alias caused cache collisions. Now includes fn.toString() in the hash.

3. operators.ts: DistinctOperator.nextColumnar called Map.get(col) per
   column per row in the dedup loop. Pre-extracts column arrays before
   the row loop, matching the pattern used by computePartialAggColumnar.
